summary: Reframed the opening around Mina watching Tomas at the county office so the chapter no longer enters on the same scenic-water scaffold as the adjacent boundary excerpt, and tightened the closing decision around an on-foot, tide-dependent return.
edits: Shifted the opening entry point from blackwater description to Mina outside the office window, preserving the same setting information and tone.
Adjusted the final line to stress a mud-route return under Mina's own weight, improving the handoff into the next chapter's low-tide access.
